problem id: e998079c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  01011100 -> 10101110
  01101010 -> 01110101
  11100110 -> 10110011
  00110000 -> 00011000
  10110011 -> 10111001
  01111010 -> 01111101
  00010110 -> 11001011
  10110101 -> 01111010
  10100111 -> 00110011
  10011110 -> 10001111

query: 00101101
predicted answer: 00110110
